case_title: DARWIS SANTOSO VS. ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY SANTOSO, DARWIS AS TO DEFENDANT ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-24-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ANSWER - TO THE 10/12/2022 REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER (SC-105) FILED BY DEFENDANT (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SANTOSO, DARWIS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-24-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-24-2022 BY JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN. PLAINTIFF DARWIS SANTOSO IS PRESENT AND ASSISTED BY COURT PROVISIONAL INDONESIAN INTERPRETER ARIS SURYAPERMANA. DEFENDANT ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM, REPRESENTED BY GEORGE WALTERS, SENIOR CLAIM CONSULTANT, ORALLY AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR. DEFENDANT ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY ORALLY STIPULATION TO JUDGE PRO TEM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY DEFENDANT ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY

ORDER ON (SC-105A) REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER (SMALL CLAIMS). THE REQUEST IS: DENIED. YOU MUST GO TO COURT IF YOU WANT TO BE HEARD. A HEARING ON THIS REQUEST IS SCHEDULED AS FOLLOWS: 10/24/2022 AT 8:30AM DEPT. 506 RE: REQUEST THAT THE COURT ENTER AN ORDER TO DISMISS OR DEMURRER PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AND ORDER (DENIAL ORDER FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 TO BE PLACED IN DOCKET FOR 10/24/22 HEARING.)
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY SANTOSO, DARWIS
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM (SMALL CLAIMS) [GEORGE WALTERS - EMPLOYEED BY DEFENDANT - ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY] FILED BY DEFENDANT ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SANTOSO, DARWIS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SC-105 REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER RE: REQUEST THAT THE COURT ENTER AN ORDER TO DISMISS OR DEMURRER PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AND ORDER FILED BY DEFENDANT ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY

REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM (SMALL CLAIMS) (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) [AARON F. MACLEITCH - RETAINED BY DEFENDANT - ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY] **FILED AT INSISTENCE OF LITIGANT** FILED BY DEFENDANT ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY
ORDER ON REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM. THE REQUEST IS DENIED. PUBLIC PROCEEDINGS. OPEN TO THE PUBLIC. [AARON F. MACLEITCH]
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-24-2022 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$100) SERVED SEP-15-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM (SMALL CLAIMS) (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) FILED BY DEFENDANT ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY
ORDER ON REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED. [GEORGE WALTERS - EMPLOYEED BY DEFENDANT - ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY]
